response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrates deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process advocacy. His background in AI agents and internal tooling directly matches the role’s focus on enterprise automation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Docker across enterprise and open-source projects
Proven expertise in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflows
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and dev-ops practices with hands-on contributions to GitLab, Kubernetes, and automation
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks (Express, custom runners) are used
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
Some roles involve DLang and legacy stacks; need to confirm recent focus remains on modern TS/Node/React ecosystem
